name: Consult
description: Comprehensive eye examination to assess vision and eye health.

name: Lens Purchase
description: Purchase of prescription eyeglasses or contact lenses.

name: Therapy
description: Vision therapy sessions to improve visual skills and processing.

name: Follow Up
description: Follow-up appointments to monitor treatment progress.

name: Pediatric Exam
description: Specialized eye exams for children to assess vision development.

name: Glaucoma Screening
description: Screening for glaucoma to detect early signs of the disease.

name: Retinal Imaging
description: Advanced imaging of the retina to diagnose and monitor eye conditions.

name: Emergency Eye Care
description: Immediate care for eye injuries or sudden vision changes.

name: Contact Lens Fitting
description: Fitting and training for contact lens wearers.

name: Low Vision Rehabilitation
description: Services to assist patients with significant vision loss.

name: Cataract Evaluation
description: Assessment and management of cataracts affecting vision.

name: Dry Eye Treatment
description: Evaluation and treatment of dry eye syndrome.

name: LASIK Consultation
description: Consultation for laser eye surgery candidates.

name: Visual Field Testing
description: Testing to assess peripheral vision and detect visual field defects.
